title: Sample Article
text:
# Datenschutz im Studium
Datenschutz beschreibt Regeln und Praktiken zum Schutz personenbezogener Daten.
In Hochschulen betrifft dies unter anderem Lernplattformen, E-Mail-Kommunikation und Projektberichte.

title: Sample Article
text:
# Meeting Documentation
Meeting documentation captures decisions, action items, and open questions in a structured way.
Well-formed records improve team continuity and accountability.

title: Sample Note
text:
# AI Governance Summary
This document outlines practical requirements for trustworthy AI systems.
Wichtige Punkte sind Transparenz, Risikobewertung und Dokumentation.

title: Sample Study Notes
text:
# Transformer Basics
Transformers rely on attention mechanisms to relate tokens to one another.
Tokenization quality affects efficiency in both English and German learning materials.
